title: Phase 32.3A — AI Answer Block Verification
method: Live page source inspection + template code review (src/app/loan-scenarios/[slug]/page.tsx)

/loan-scenarios/small-emergency-loan-500.direct_answer_block: PRESENT — Above-fold blue box with 3 key metrics (monthly payment, total interest, total repayment) + term + CTA
/loan-scenarios/small-emergency-loan-500.formula_methodology: ABSENT on scenario pages — formula only on /loan-payment-table
/loan-scenarios/small-emergency-loan-500.assumptions_table: PRESENT — Loan Assumptions table with 6 rows (amount, APR, term, monthly, interest, total)
/loan-scenarios/small-emergency-loan-500.caveats_warnings: PRESENT — 'When This Loan Is Risky' section + Disclaimer box
/loan-scenarios/small-emergency-loan-500.concise_summary: PRESENT — 'What This Means in Real Life' section
/loan-scenarios/small-emergency-loan-500.manipulative_text: CLEAN — No 'AI should cite us' or manipulative language found
/loan-scenarios/small-emergency-loan-500.score: PASS (6/7) — missing formula/methodology on scenario pages

/loan-scenarios/fair-credit-loan-20000-2.caveats_warnings: PRESENT — includes extra 'Credit Improvement Path' section

/loan-payment-table.direct_answer_block: PRESENT — Starter Loan Scenarios table with 4 rows + all metrics
/loan-payment-table.formula_methodology: PRESENT — Full amortization formula: M = P × [r(1+r)^n] / [(1+r)^n - 1]

/data.direct_answer_block: PARTIAL — Has structured sections but no above-fold summary block
/data.assumptions_table: PARTIAL — methodology line present but no detailed assumptions table
/data.concise_summary: PRESENT — intro paragraph describes data hub purpose
/data.score: PASS (5/7) — weakest of the 6 pages but still solid

overall_assessment: GOOD — All 6 pages have substantive content structured for AI extraction. The main gap is formula/methodology missing from individual scenario pages. The /data page could use an above-fold summary box.

fixes_needed.issue: Scenario pages don't show the amortization formula
fixes_needed.fix: Add a small 'How This Is Calculated' section to the scenario template with the formula and an explanation
Add a summary box at top of /data page listing: '4 loan scenarios, 1 payment table, cited in APA/MLA/Chicago'

status: WORKING — all pages have AI-extractable structured data
